examples: There were some chairs in the classroom.
There weren't any tables in the school yard.
There was an award for English.
The awards ceremony was in the school yard.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Irregular plurals: man -> men, woman -> women, child -> children.
examples: Lots of men, women, and children.
How many men are there? There are two men.
How many children are there? There are four children.

key_sentences: Was it good? It was great!
It was the school awards ceremony. We were late.
There weren't any children in the classroom. But there were some teachers.
The awards ceremony was in the school yard.
Look! Lots of men, women, and children.
There was an award for English.
How many men are there? There are two men.
Kim was first. Joe was fourth.

phonics.description: The ending sounds ng (as in ring) and nk (as in bank). Listen for the final sound of each word.
chant: Sing a song while you swing, swing, swing.
Look at the king with his ring, ring, ring.
Now you're thirsty, have a drink, drink, drink.
Look at the king with his drink, drink, drink.
